common.title:
Enter your
serial number.
common.description: Check if your PlayStation 5 can be jailbroken by entering its serial number

form.label: Enter your PS5 serial number
form.hint: You can find the serial number on the back/bottom of your PS5 console
form.invalidFormat: Invalid serial number format. Please check and try again.
form.tooShort: Serial number is too short. Please enter at least 10 characters.

jailbreakable.title: Great News!
jailbreakable.description: This PS5 is likely jailbreakable! The estimated factory firmware is within the exploitable range.

notJailbreakable.title: Not Jailbreakable
notJailbreakable.description: This PS5 likely shipped with a firmware version that is not currently exploitable.

uncertain.title: Uncertain
uncertain.description: This PS5 was manufactured during a transition period. The actual firmware could vary. Please check the firmware version directly on the console.

guide.title: Where to Find the Serial Number
guide.subtitle: Check the serial number before purchasing — no need to open the box
guide.step1Desc: Look at the bottom of the PS5 retail box. The serial number is printed on a label — no need to open or turn on the console.
guide.step2Desc: Locate the barcode label on the box. It contains the serial number, model info, and manufacturing details.
guide.step3Desc: The serial number starts with 'S01-'. Type it into the checker above to see if the PS5 is jailbreakable before you buy.

about.title: About This Tool
about.whatIsThisDesc: This tool helps you determine if a PlayStation 5 console can potentially be jailbroken by analyzing its serial number. The serial number contains manufacturing date information which correlates with the factory-installed firmware version.
about.howItWorksDesc: PS5 consoles ship with a factory firmware that corresponds to their manufacturing date. By decoding the serial number, we can estimate the firmware version and check if it falls within the range of known exploits. The data is based on the PSDevWiki Serial Number Guide and community research.
about.disclaimerDesc: This site is not affiliated with Sony Interactive Entertainment. PlayStation and PS5 are registered trademarks of Sony Interactive Entertainment LLC.

seo.pageTitle: Is my PS5 Jailbreakable? | Serial Number Firmware Checker
seo.pageDescription: Check if your PlayStation 5 can be jailbroken by entering its serial number. Fast, accurate firmware detection based on manufacturing data from PSDevWiki.
seo.ogTitle: PS5 Jailbreak Checker - Check Your Serial Number
seo.ogDescription: Free tool to check if your PS5 is jailbreakable by serial number. Instant firmware estimation based on community data.
